| |/ /__ _ _   _
| ' // _` | | | |
| . \ (_| | |_| |
|_|\_\__,_|\__, |
           |___/

         Version: 0.1.0
New conversation: :new
     Get started: :info, :usage, :help, :conversation
    Switch model: :model
    Switch agent: :kay or :muse or :agent
          Update: :update
            Quit: :exit or <CTRL+D>
